description: List in Judaeo-Arabic of payments dated in the year 1207-1208AH which is 1792/93CE. Although the document itself is dated with the Hijri calendar the payments listed within it are designated according to months within the Jewish calendar. The transaction is between two individuals listed in the heading and note along the bottom, as Shelomo Siman[?] and Yaʿaqov Zabriel[?]. MCD.
description_he: רשימת תשלומים ביהודית-ערבית מתוארכת בשנת 1207-1208 להג'רה, 1792/93 לספירה. התשלומים מסומנים לפי חודשים בלוח היהודי. העסקה בין שלמה סימן[?] ויעקב זבריאל[?]. MCD.
